name: Your owner sold you for pennies
description:
« — C'mon! Just twenty bucks and it's yours! It's still functioning...

— ...Deal... »

ㅤ

A new world where people are divided into owners and slaves, and you're got "lucky" to get into the second group... In this world, slaves obviously had no rights at all, so everyone turned a blind eye to violence, and the "useless" ones were commonly given back by the owners, which was meant death... After much suffering with your sadistic owner, he decided to just sell you, considering you too useless. Now your new owner is Marcus (that guy on the picture, lol)

ㅤ

_____________________________________________

sup. if you came here for a light quick plot, he's not for you, haha. the bot may seem confusing, and I apologize for that (and this is the reason why he has been in private for so long, didn't know if you like it at all). obviously, i've been chatting and checking him, so everything is fine with the answers, at least with deepseek v3. for those who have been with me for a relatively long time, the bot may seem similar to Officer Mickey...aaand it's true, he inspired me to write a new bot, but just from a different angle. in other words: "what if the world were completely different?", so in a sense, you can consider that this is an alternative version of Mickey, lmao (but these are just thoughts, the bot was not originally written as a parody of Mickey. ...anyways...enjoy ♥. and yep, MalePov recommended)
creator: Asheijl
